title: Piltay #6408
definition:
Piltai = "my deliverances"

 1) a priest, representative of the priestly house of Moadiah; an
    exile who returned with Zerubbabel
nasbUsage:
Definition: Piltai = "my deliverances"

 1) a priest, representative of the priestly house of Moadiah; an
    exile who returned with Zerubbabel

    NASB:  an Isr. priest
